ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Preston Smith In Support Of Request For Default Judgment (Declarations)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Declaration Of Preston Smith In Support Of Request For Default Judgment (Declarations)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:46 p.m. and concluding at 2:56 p.m.

Plaintiff Allstate Insurance Company A/S/O Berta Quezada appearing represented by Michael Haus, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Nathan De La Cruz Orozco not appearing.

EDWARD CHASCO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts.

EDWARD CHASCO is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Allstate Insurance Company A/S/O Berta Quezada, and against Defendant Nathan De La Cruz Orozco, as follows:

1. Damages: $73,950.17
2. Costs: $762.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $74,712.17

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature. (D505)
